assertions.expectation: Starts with pre-flight checks: current versions, cluster health, node status
assertions.reason: Includes comprehensive pre-flight checks with commands to check current cluster version, node pool versions, cluster health, and node status

assertions.expectation: Includes the gcloud command to check available versions in the release channel
assertions.reason: Provides 'gcloud container get-server-config --zone $ZONE --format="yaml(validMasterVersions)"' command to check available upgrade versions

assertions.expectation: Includes the API deprecation check command before upgrading
assertions.reason: Does not include any command to check for API deprecations before upgrading, which is critical for version upgrades

assertions.expectation: Provides the exact gcloud command for control plane upgrade (--master flag or --cluster-version)
assertions.reason: Provides exact command 'gcloud container clusters upgrade $CLUSTER_NAME --zone $ZONE --master --cluster-version "1.33"'

assertions.expectation: Includes a verification step after control plane upgrade with expected output
assertions.reason: Includes verification commands to check control plane version and test cluster connectivity after upgrade

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for node pool upgrades — may use skip-level (N+2) for node pools to reduce steps
assertions.reason: Provides exact gcloud commands for upgrading both node pools to 1.33, though uses direct upgrade rather than skip-level

assertions.expectation: Includes monitoring commands to watch node pool upgrade progress
assertions.reason: Includes comprehensive monitoring loops with status checks and version verification for both node pools

assertions.expectation: Provides sequential control plane upgrades (1.32→1.33) with option for skip-level node pool upgrades
assertions.reason: Performs direct upgrade from 1.32 to 1.33 but does not mention or provide option for skip-level node pool upgrades

assertions.expectation: Includes post-upgrade validation: node versions, pod health, kube-system pods
assertions.reason: Comprehensive post-upgrade validation including node versions, pod health checks, and kube-system pod status verification

assertions.expectation: Provides a rollback section explaining what to do if something goes wrong
assertions.reason: Includes troubleshooting section and rollback procedure with warning about control plane limitations and node pool rollback options
